evals.prompt: I just refactored the authentication middleware to use JWT instead of session cookies. Can you record this decision?
evals.expected_output: Should detect cwmem, check initialization, then create an entry with --type decision capturing the auth refactor rationale, and offer to sync export.

evals.prompt: Set up cwmem in this project so we can start tracking architectural decisions.
evals.expected_output: Should ask the user about project type, default author, and initial entities, then run cwmem init and set things up.

evals.prompt: What decisions have we made about the database layer? Search our memory.
evals.expected_output: Should run cwmem search with appropriate query and filters, present results clearly.
